# [[Subdirectories]]
add_subdirectory(SDL2 EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)


# [[Binaries]]
eightgine_add_module(MODULE_NAME "SDL2"
    MODULE_INCLUDE_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/include" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/include/SDL2"
    MODULE_TYPE INTERFACE
    MODULE_DEFINITIONS INTERFACE SDL_MAIN_HANDLED
)

# [[Dependencies]]
if(UNIX)
    eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2" DEPENDENCY_NAME "pthread" MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SPECIFIER INTERFACE)
    eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2" DEPENDENCY_NAME "dl" MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SPECIFIER INTERFACE)
    eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2" DEPENDENCY_NAME "m" MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SPECIFIER INTERFACE)

    eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2" DEPENDENCY_NAME "X11" MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SPECIFIER INTERFACE)
    eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2" DEPENDENCY_NAME "Xext" MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SPECIFIER INTERFACE)
    eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2" DEPENDENCY_NAME "Xrandr" MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SPECIFIER INTERFACE)
    eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2" DEPENDENCY_NAME "Xcursor" MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SPECIFIER INTERFACE)
    eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2" DEPENDENCY_NAME "Xi" MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SPECIFIER INTERFACE)

    eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2" DEPENDENCY_NAME "wayland-client" MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SPECIFIER INTERFACE)
    eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2" DEPENDENCY_NAME "wayland-cursor" MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SPECIFIER INTERFACE)
    eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2" DEPENDENCY_NAME "wayland-egl" MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SPECIFIER INTERFACE)

    eightgine_link_dependency(MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_NAME "SDL2" DEPENDENCY_NAME "GL" MODULE_OR_EXECUTABLE_SPECIFIER INTERFACE)
endif()
